title: Just finished my WAD assignment!
content: Finally done with the Express + EJS project. MongoDB was tricky at first but once you understand collections and documents, it clicks. Anyone else struggling with Mongoose populate?

title: Best bubble tea near SMU?
content: Looking for recommendations! I've tried LiHO and KOI but want something new. Bonus points if they have brown sugar boba.

title: Tips for surviving finals week
content: 1. Start revision early (lol who actually does this). 2. Form study groups. 3. Don't pull all-nighters, sleep is important. 4. Past year papers are your best friend.

title: Is Node.js still worth learning in 2026?
content: With all the new frameworks coming out, is it still worth investing time into Node.js and Express? Or should I jump straight into something like Bun or Deno?

title: Free food at SIS basement today!
content: Some club event giving away pizza and drinks. Go before it runs out!

title: Help: Why is my CSS not centering?
content: I've tried margin: 0 auto, text-align: center, flexbox, grid... nothing works. My div refuses to center. What am I doing wrong?

title: Internship at Shopee vs Grab — which one?
content: Got offers from both for summer internship. Shopee is backend, Grab is full-stack. Pay is similar. Which would you choose and why?

title: Anyone playing Elden Ring DLC?
content: Just got the DLC and it's absolutely brutal. The new bosses are insane. Who else is playing?

title: Hidden ramen spot at Tanjong Pagar
content: Found this tiny ramen place tucked away in a corner. Only 8 seats. The tonkotsu broth is unreal. DM me for the exact location!

title: When the code works but you don't know why
content: That feeling when you randomly delete a semicolon and everything starts working. Programming is just advanced guessing at this point.

title: Built a Spotify playlist analyzer with Python
content: Uses the Spotify API to analyze your top tracks and generate stats like most common genres, average BPM, and mood scores. Repo link in comments!

title: EJS vs Handlebars vs Pug — which template engine?
content: Starting a new project and can't decide on a template engine. EJS feels familiar since it's basically HTML, but Pug looks cleaner. Thoughts?

title: Each A Cup brown sugar boba review
content: Finally tried the famous brown sugar boba from Each A Cup near Clarke Quay. 8/10 — great texture, not too sweet, pearls were chewy. Would recommend!

title: How I went from 0 to a job offer in 6 months
content: Started learning to code in September, did FreeCodeCamp, built 3 projects, applied to 50 companies, got 5 interviews, landed 1 offer. AMA!
